facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 2,255 reviews. And it sits right on Ông Lang beach.

Camia Resort & Spa keeps delivering: free breakfast, infinity pool, palm-lined grounds, and rooms that actually let the air in.

This is the quieter side of Phu Quoc. No crowds. No chaos. Just the sound of the ocean and a pool you'll never want to leave.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Infinity pool. Palm trees. Ocean 30 seconds away. Camia Resort & Spa at Ông Lang is what a Phu Quoc reset actually looks like. 4.8 stars from 2,255 guests. Book early.
